data.name: YOUR MEDIEVAL ADULT STORE
data.detailed_description:
🔞 Welcome to the world of medieval pleasures!

Build your 18+ shop, manage your inventory, and become the most famous merchant of forbidden pleasures in the kingdom. Sell forbidden goods, serve eccentric customers, and grow your business.

⚜️ In the game you will find:

🏺 Assortment — expand your store's shelves and open up new “categories of pleasure.”

💃 Clients with character — knights, witches, and noble ladies with their secret desires.

🛒 Managing a shop — from product selection to pricing.

🧙‍♀️ Staff — hire assistants and increase your profits

🏰 Grow your business — expand your sales floors and turn a simple shop into a thriving establishment known throughout the kingdom.

Open the doors of your shop and become the master of medieval pleasures!

data.short_description: 🔞 Your Medieval Adult Store — open an adult shop in a medieval town! Sell hot goods, serve unusual customers, hire employees, and grow your business, turning a modest shop into a thriving enterprise.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 524 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 524 MB 可用空間
